name: persistent_failure_surface_v1
purpose: Persistent hard-failure surface extracted from the current serious control. Use for small diagnostic cycles only; do not promote from this slice alone.
notes: HR_011 is the clearest retrieval/page-discovery miss in the current control.
HR_006 and HR_016 retain support in packed evidence but still underperform in final answer coverage or exactness handling.
This surface should be revised only when the control profile and current failure pattern change materially.
